name: Tina Smith
subject: Can you be a founding member?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Before the end of the year.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181228_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, These next few days are incredibly important for ensuring that we have the resources to kick off our campaign in the new year. We need to raise $20,000 between now and the end of the year to ensure we can keep our staff on the ground and keep us organizing in 2019. **[Can you pitch in now and be a founding member of this campaign?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181228_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181228_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") We went all-in to win in 2018 and you were a big part of that. But that also means that heading into 2019 we don't have the resources yet we need to ensure we can keep organizing. That's why we're counting on you. **[Please make a contribution before the year ends and be a founding member of this re-election campaign.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181228_em&amount=10&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Thank you for everything, Tina | **Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race NBC News has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-december?refcode=rtw_20181228_em-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4d2ff/c1f7015/61cce566/1140c20a/3266255484/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Closing Out An Epic Year
body:
In just a few days, we'll officially close out an epic 2018. On behalf of our entire Indiana Republican Party, I wanted to be the first to wish you... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/closing-out-an-epic-year?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
| **_Closing Out An Epic Year_** In just a few days, we'll officially close out an epic 2018. On behalf of our entire Indiana Republican Party, I wanted to be the first to wish you a Happy New Year and a prosperous 2019! I know together, more election victories and an even stronger Indiana are in our future! -Kyle Hupfer
---
|
---
|
---
---
---

name: Maria Brewer
subject: Building the bench
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

With just days left in the year, we still need to raise at least $18,000 to reach our fundraising goal and head into 2019 strong.

This year, we’re headed to all 95 counties to start organizing early and recruiting strong Democratic candidates to run for office. Winning local elections and building a deep bench of candidates takes grit and grassroots energy.

We’re excited for this work, and we need the resources to make it happen: Chip in $50, $100, or more right now to help us reach our goal and elect more Democrats!

Thank you so much for your continued support.

Maria

--

Maria Brewer
Director of Party Affairs, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/9gOJa1VQ3OSmMdOFqpJnHaXAFJboS_qicoL_Aj2qtkY=/SZmNGQsl8ZPsUl0Trg4e91U8lLqMGj8G4L9wu-Ew5Dw=.

name: Team NHGOP
subject: The 2019 NHGOP State Committee Annual Meeting
body:
Derek, This serves as an additional reminder for**the 2019 Annual Meeting** of the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. name: Team Walz-Flanagan
subject: What a year
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
|
---

Friend:
We are so grateful for everyone who came together to be a part of Team One Minnesota. Every person who joined our team did their part to create a historic victory in November.
**We 're asking for your help again. We need you to dig deep, and help us make One Minnesota a reality.** Campaigns are expensive, and we want to make sure that we hit our end-of-year budget target. [**Will you rush a contribution right now?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50)**
**[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100)**
**[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250)**
**[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=?refcode=_other)**

We won't take a lot of your time, but we need your help to keep Minnesota moving forward. We've accomplished so much together already, and we can't stop now. **[Click here, and chip in before the end of the year right now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/CU5vXvyuceJQ90OBBiUzTKztTGFvWILkCaNarndPrug=/Jetf9G-KRtmInejYecB9MImg_r7pvz1UNhE_RKIEiFA=)**

In gratitude,
Team Walz-Flanagan

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Tiny seeds that make a big difference
body:
| | Peter, It doesn’t take long to look at our culture today and realize there are some serious problems. There are constant signs reminding us things are not right. Just turn on the TV or look at our movies; our entertainment is a mirror reflecting back at us the state of our culture - broken marriages and families. Or take a look at Brett Kavanuagh’s Supreme Court hearing for example. Remember the protesters shouting during the hearing for a women’s right to “choose”? Those moments, now historic, remind us we are in the midst of a spiritual battle over the sanctity of life. And I think about our fellow Christian, Jack Phillips, the baker from Colorado who fought for religious liberty not just for himself, but also for all Americans, by taking his case all the way to the Supreme Court. He won, but he and many other artists are _still_ dealing with additional legal attacks. **All of these problems can feel overwhelming. And you may, at one time or another, have asked yourself, “what can I do that could actually make a difference?”** You’re not alone. We’ve all asked that question before. And the answer is simple. We each do our part to be faithful with what God has called us to do. Sometimes it might seem like we only have a tiny mustard seed to offer, but that’s enough. We aren’t responsible for the outcomes. We just do our part, however small, even if it’s the size of a mustard seed – **_we are to plant it!_** (Matthew 13:31) We won’t fix the culture overnight. We won’t see biblical principles upheld in one single election cycle. Generational change begins with our small decisions of faithfulness today; and they will produce a return that will grow for generations. **[Will you stand with us by making a gift in 2018? Your donation will help make it possible to engage more Christians in 2019 and mobilize millions for 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181229apl01nd&n=1)** As a non-profit organization, we rely on people like you to stand with us in your prayers and financial generosity. **When you invest in My Faith Votes, you are planting mustard seeds all across the United States by:**
* Equipping Christians to stand for biblical values in their communities and our country
* Imparting a Biblical worldview to the next generation of voters
* Mobilizing a united force of Christians in local communities across the country who will speak up for the voice of the unborn, religious freedom, marriage and family, and compassion for those in need

In 2018, supporters’ donations made it possible for us to reach millions of Christians across the country to take action to change the nation with biblical values. And now, we need partners who will stand with us and make a year-end gift, because the work is far from finished. Protecting the principles of life, religious liberty, and marriage and family _must_ continue. **[It is urgent that we have your help today to reach our year-end goal of $380,000 so we can start 2019 strong and build well for 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181229apl01nd&n=2).** Any amount you give, however big or small, is a tremendous investment in the future of our nation to preserve peace and prosperity. Please give your best year-end, tax-deductible gift today! Every dollar you give before the end of the year will be DOUBLED thanks to a generous matching grant. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p181231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181229apl01nd&n=3) Thank you for believing in biblical values and working with us to build a faith-filled future in America. **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181229apl01nd&n=4) >
---
* * *
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e181229apl01nd&n=5).
[ ](//www.facebook.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.twitter.com/myfaithvotes) [ ](//www.instagram.com/myfaithvotes)

name: Jeff Teague
subject: Our Resolution for 2019
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
Dear Peter,

WOW! We are blown away by the response we’ve received so far in helping us reach our end-of-year fundraising goal.

We’re committed to electing Democrats who work to create good-paying jobs, fight to make sure our rural hospitals stay open, and work to ensure every student in Tennessee can get the education that fits their vision for a better future.

We resolve to do everything we can to elect more Democrats in 2019 and beyond. Will you help us keep our resolution by donating $50, $75, or $125 today?

Thank you so much for your support.

Jeff

--

Jeff Teague
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE |
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tennessee Democratic Party
1900 Church Street, Suite 203
Nashville TN 37203 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/XqT0Xva1-JrZmSb36VON2daU7iqdyRatWj7Zw_uN8hw=/qMibvInxoGCDeBH2zNf0qjjxxzMcYlS5lr34yQyj6Fk=.

name: Team Cooper
subject: This deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We did the math. We need your help before the deadline.

[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bdc/1646629099/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc")
---
Friend, As 2018 comes to a close, our biggest and most important deadline of the year is here. TWhen we close the books at midnight on December 31, that's it for this fundraising period. Our team got together a few days ago to map out where we need to be to make sure we're on budget before the deadline. **We worked out that we needed to raise another $25,000 online before midnight on Dec. 31 to hit our budget. Right now, we're still about $17,000 short of that goal. Roy's counting on us to get this done -- are you in?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Chip in $5 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bdf/1646629099/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=5")
---
[Chip in $50 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bde/1646629099/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck1pQjlmUT09IjoiNTAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---
[Chip in $100 ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bd1/1646629099/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOck15QjlmUT09IjoiMTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc&utm_source=rcoop&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---
[Chip in another amount ->](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bd0/1646629099/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc&utm_source=rcoop")
---

2019 will bring new opportunities and new challenges, and we want to make sure that we have what we need to for Roy to be successful.
Thanks to you, we broke the super-majorities in both the House and the Senate.
Let's continue the momentum and make sure we hit this end-of-year goal.
**[Chip in if you're in. ](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203f08/2fde7c66/48540355/15685bdc/1646629099/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2018eoy?refcode=20181229_eoydeadline3_tc")**
Thanks for all you continue to do for our state,
Team Cooper

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?One=20Minnesota=20Inaugural=20Committee?=
subject: Will you join us in Duluth?
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friends:

Thank you for all of your help in electing Tim Walz and Peggy Flanagan our next Governor and Lieutenant Governor.

We hope you'll be able to celebrate with us in Duluth after they officially take office!

**Please join us for the Duluth One Minnesota Inaugural Celebration on Thursday, January 10 at the Kirby Student Center Lounge at the University of Minnesota Duluth.**

The celebration is free and open to the public, but tickets are required.** [Click here to reserve your free ticket.](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=8b5504a5a4&e=b70d12d84a)**
**Duluth One Minnesota Inaugural Celebration**

**Thursday, January 10, 2019**
5:00 pm - 7:30 pm

**Kirby Student Center Lounge
University of Minnesota Duluth**
1120 Kirby Dr
Duluth, MN 55812
Light refreshments will be served. Free parking is available in the Maroon Lot E by the Kathryn A. Martin Library. Additional parking is available along Kirby Drive and in the Pay Lot. Please continue to check **[OneMinnesotaInaugural.org](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=5c9db2eb5a&e=b70d12d84a)** as we update it with more details.

Thank you, and we'll see if on January 10 -- if not before! [If you haven't already, reserve your ticket right now!](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=bf54d36328&e=b70d12d84a)

Thank you for all that you do,

One Minnesota Inaugural Committee

---
| | |
---
| One Minnesota Inaugural Committee is a Minnesota nonprofit corporation registered with the Internal Revenue Service as a political organization under Section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to the One Minnesota Inaugural Committee are not tax deductible. Contact: [events@walz2019.org](mailto:events@walz2019.org) One Minnesota Inaugural Committee, 620 Wesley Commons Drive, Unit 28, Golden Valley, MN 55427

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=88a0d92b4b&e=b70d12d84a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://walzflanagan.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=aa2b1c817521919c572975274&id=88a0d92b4b&e=b70d12d84a&c=61c709ba4b).

---
